full_text:
Lai Gong 賴恭
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lai Gong (賴恭)was born in Lingling commandery. Driven away by Wu Ju, he later became a senior minister for Liu Bei. Lai Gong was affiliated with Liu Biao and the Shu Kingdom.
